case_title: MACKENZIE GREEN BAIL BONDS VS. JOSE ANTONIO ZUNIGA et al

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-20-2003 CONTINUED TO SEP-24-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. AUG-20-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-18-2003 CONTINUED TO JUN-20-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACKENZIE GREEN BAIL BONDS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZUNIGA, JOSE ANTONIO $15,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,680.00, -ORIGINAL CONTRACT SUBMITTED/STAMPED JUDGMENT RENDERED.
